title: std::out_of_range crash in Verilog backend after alumacc pass
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.52+63 (git sha1 6a2f2f181, clang++  -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

minimized.rtlil:
```
# Generated by Yosys 0.52+63 (git sha1 6a2f2f181, clang++ 20.1.2 -fPIC -O3)
autoidx 941
attribute \src "synth.v:271.1-7843.10"
attribute \top 1
module \mkTop
  attribute $bugpoint 1
  wire width 2 $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$923
  attribute $bugpoint 1
  wire width 2 $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$924
  attribute $bugpoint 1
  wire width 2 $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$927
  attribute $bugpoint 1
  wire width 2 output 1 $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$928
  attribute \src "synth.v:6674.8-6674.33"
  wire width 2 $sub$synth.v:6674$752_Y
  attribute \src "synth.v:6674.7-6674.41"
  cell $add $add$synth.v:6674$753
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    parameter \A_WIDTH 2
    parameter \B_SIGNED 0
    parameter \B_WIDTH 2
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 2
    connect \A $sub$synth.v:6674$752_Y
    connect \B $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$927
    connect \Y $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$928
  end
  attribute \src "synth.v:6674.8-6674.33"
  cell $sub $sub$synth.v:6674$752
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    parameter \A_WIDTH 2
    parameter \B_SIGNED 0
    parameter \B_WIDTH 2
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 2
    connect \A $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$923
    connect \B $auto$bugpoint.cc:258:simplify_something$924
    connect \Y $sub$synth.v:6674$752_Y
  end
end
```

```
yosys -p 'read_rtlil minimized.rtlil; alumacc; write_verilog -sv crash.v'
```

<details>
  <summary>Original repro steps, with over 400KiB of verilog</summary>

- Grab reproducer source [synth.v.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19842921/synth.v.txt) and yosys script [synth.ys.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19842926/synth.ys.txt). Fix file extensions by removing `.txt` suffix (github apparently forbids .v and .ys attachments...).
- `yosys -T synth.ys`

The source is not a reduced reproducer I'm afraid, it's a big pile of Verilog that was output by the Bluespec compiler. The yosys script is trivial:

```
read_verilog -sv -defer synth.v
hierarchy -top mkTop
proc
write_verilog -sv synth.before-alumacc.v
write_rtlil synth.before-alumacc.rtlil
alumacc
write_rtlil synth.after-alumacc.rtlil
write_verilog -sv synth.crash.v
```
</details>

### Expected Behavior

The script run a few very preliminary synthesis passes, then uses `write_verilog` to write the transformed source back out. I expect it to successfully write the verilog file.

### Actual Behavior

Yosys crashes with:

```
7. Executing Verilog backend.

7.1. Executing BMUXMAP pass.

7.2. Executing DEMUXMAP pass.
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::out_of_range'
  what():  Cell::getParam()
```

I originally encountered this with the synth_lattice command, but I bisected it down to something `alumacc` does to the design: `write_verilog` completes successfully before alumacc has run, and crashes as above after it runs.

This does _not_ reproduce on Yosys 0.51. At a glance, `Added $macc_v2 cell` in the 0.52 release notes sounds related (well, has overlapping sequences of characters with the pass that leads to the crash at least...).

<details>
  <summary>Additional RTLIL files from the original reproducer with a huge input, probably no longer relevant given the minimized reproducer</summary>

The repro synthesis script above also dumps RTLIL before/after alumacc, and that works without issues. For convenience, here's 4 RTLIL outputs:
 - Yosys 0.51, before `alumacc` pass: [0_51.before-alumacc.rtlil.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19842979/0_51.before-alumacc.rtlil.txt)
- Yosys 0.51, after `alumacc` pass: [0_51.after-alumacc.rtlil.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19842977/0_51.after-alumacc.rtlil.txt)
- Yosys HEAD (6a2f2f181831a91d23caf32d4429fc0eea389cf8), before `alumacc` pass: [HEAD.before-alumacc.rtlil.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19842978/HEAD.before-alumacc.rtlil.txt)
- Yosys HEAD (6a2f2f181831a91d23caf32d4429fc0eea389cf8), after `alumacc` pass: [HEAD.after-alumacc.rtlil.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19842980/HEAD.after-alumacc.rtlil.txt) **(this is the design that crashes `write_verilog`)**
</details>
